channel.title: Creative Archive
channel.description: Don't miss out on novelties from The Creative Archive!

item.title: Star battle Interactive
item.description:
Star Battle now integrates the HyperRogue engine. Thanks ZenoRogue!

Puzzle 13 added.

item.title: Autumn update
item.description:
To mark the beginning of Autumn, a new colour theme was applied across the Creative Archive.

Puzzle Type colours were adjusted, and a tutorial mode added.

Gravirinth [mini] added.

Wide refactoring and bugfixes.

item.title: Reorderings, bugfix
item.description:
Puzzle Type levels were reordered after playtesting feedback, and new labels and were added. Some bugfixes. Thanks Kristian Hedeholm and Deusovi!

Levels LOO*** added.

item.title: Level transitions, new levels, etc...
item.description:
New animated transitions when entering/exiting a level and the title screen. Instructions mode added. Several changes and fixes.

Levels MAG*** and TEL*** added.

item.title: Keystroke list, letter animation, better sound notes
item.description:
Puzzle Type now sports a hangman-style keystroke list with three different types of strokes: normal, invalid and special.

Also, the sound feedback for invalid strokes as well as the notes in level DEA*** were improved.

Level STA*** letter insertion animated. Hints improved.

All hints were completed.

Thanks Kristian Hedeholm, Patrick Collin Eye, Blubberquark, Builder17 for your help!

item.title: Hint module & extras
item.description:
The hint module was expanded to add hints to some levels in Puzzle Type.

Thanks Kristian Hedeholm for the suggestions !

item.title: Progress saving small fix
item.description: The progress saving system In Puzzle Type now withstands changes in level ordering. Thanks Kristian Hedeholm and Patrick Collin Eye!

item.title: Difficulty stars & symbols, trailer, new level
item.description:
In Puzzle Type, ✲ indicates level difficulty, other symbols have different meanings: ⌕ . Thanks Kristian Hedeholm and Thinky Puzzle Games discord server!

A small trailer was added.

New level! STA***. Level MON*** became LA****, provisionally.

item.title: Typographic excursion + fixes
item.description:
Level TOP*** was overhauled with morphing letters.

Diverse minor fixes, related to the undo queue and the arrow keys.

item.title: Redo support
item.description: As this feature was needed for Puzzle Type, the Game Bar now has a nice (redo) redo button - a suggestion by Patrick Collin Eye and Kristian Hedeholm!

item.title: Global hall of fame
item.description: There is now a global Hall of Fame for winners of any puzzlescript game played in the game-console. Have a try!

item.title: Puzzle type Gamma
item.description:
The Gamma Phase has started, with a fresh round of videoplaytests. Contact Pedro PSI to join!

More updates: level FUCHSIA (formerly WHITE) removed.

item.title: Puzzle type beta changes V
item.description:
More updates: level CAR*** became IRO***, adding a couple twists. DEA*** was expanded and synthesised sounds added. Many thanks, Patrick Collin Eye!

New level MON*** added, still experimental!

item.title: Puzzle type beta changes IV
item.description: More updates: levels THI*** and COP*** added; TEN*** became CAR***, a more interesting clue. Reordering of later levels. Major fix to the undo queue. Minor bugs.

item.title: Game stats & other improvements
item.description:
Most games now display a chart with the number of wins per level.

Also, it is now possible to jump directly to any level by adding the URL parameter: e.g. ?level=levelTitle or e.g. ?level=2.

Major refactoring and minor scattered fixes.

item.title: Puzzle type beta changes III
item.description: Ongoing beta playtesting changes: NUC*** became TEN*** a less ambiguous clue, added new puzzle GEN*** but removed TAN***, a critical synonym was added to LAT***, WAS*** was recentered.

item.title: Puzzle type beta changes II
item.description: Ongoing beta playtesting changes: a clearer deduction path was added to DVO***, the NOK*** space display was improved, SYM*** operates now at word level, minor additions to ANA***, NIG*** was expanded, MOR*** was fully redesigned, and the clue in WEI*** changed to LAT***. Number and space input was allowed where helpful. Replaced SUP*** with APA***. Added FIL***, DEA*** and WAS*** so the total number of levels is now 29. Many thanks, Patrick Collin Eye!

item.title: Puzzle type beta changes I
item.description: Ongoing beta playtesting changes: clue HOMEOMORPHIC became TOP*** (with new rules); CHERISHEDWOMAN became SHE*** (expanded ruleset, same logic); O** received a new keyword; NOK*** lost the backspace glitch; small CSS tweaks and spacebar inputs support. Many thanks, Plurmorant!

item.title: Puzzle type fix (for the Safari browser)
item.description: "Hoisting of functions inside conditionals" was the Javascript inconsistency blocking Puzzle Type on Safari - not anymore!

item.title: Game Console Fork support
item.description: The Game Console learned to request the appropriate PS fork for each game.

item.title: Puzzle type +1 level, new screenshots
item.description: One new level replaced an older one, keeping the total number constant. New screenshots were also added.

item.title: Strata Hedges mechanics draft
item.description: A first draft of Strata Hedges was shared privately, showcasing the novel tridimensional mechanics.

item.title: Creative Archive Generator Update
item.description:
The Creative Archive is now 100% generated in Javascript, thus bringing faster editing speeds. The new Generator uses String Templates.

Good side effects include reduced page size, plus new functionalities such as multiple Tag filtering.

Bugs are to be expected.

item.title: Night mode VS Dark Theme
item.description: Night mode will now activate when the operating system prefers a dark theme. Its colour tones are now nicer: slighly less red/black, and now more orange/dark gray.

item.title: Puzzle Type Colourisation
item.description:
Each level now has its own colour.

With two new levels and after major level reordering, the milestone of 26 levels (one per letter of the latin alphabet) was reached.

item.title: PuzzleScript Editor + Game Bar
item.description: There is now a convenient Pedro PSI's Adapted Puzzlescript editor which exports any PuzzleScript game with game bar by default.

item.title: Puzzlescript Components Database
item.description: A database of Puzzlescript components, prototypes and mechanic demonstrations was added to Game Tools to complement the Puzzlescript Games Database.

item.title: Gravirinth major update
item.description: Gravirinth Legacy now runs much faster thanks to Jack Lance's Large Maps Puzzlescript Fork.

item.title: Database Search + submission options
item.description: The Puzzlescript Games Database underwent several improvements. Among them, there are now more submission options, and search was added across all data categories. Search can be triggered by user input and indicated in the URL.

item.title: Game bar icon embellishment
item.description: The Pedro PSI's game bar now sports cross-platform icons, which activate a nice typewriter tooltip effect on hover, revealing the button function plus the corresponding keyboard shortcut.

item.title: Related games in game console
item.description: Two new buttons: + (more) (more games by the same author) and (wrench) (edit source).

item.title: Puzzle Type new levels
item.description: Two new levels. Thanks minotalen for testing!

item.title: Diverse improvements
item.description:
All Creative Archive's PWAs are now are playable offline, so this feature is out of beta.

TOCs show now collapsed by default.

item.title: Puzzlescript games database expansion
item.description: The Puzzlescript Games Database now sports over 1300 titles.

item.title: Store opens
item.description: The Creative Archive now has a dedicated Store, featuring pearls such as Puzzle Type.Experimental

item.title: Game bar Minor changes
item.description: Layout colour changes, especially in headers, and font variation added. Minor game bar updates.

item.title: LUL in development
item.description: The Level Unlocking Language draft is released for discussion.

item.title: Status page
item.description: Users may now perform self-checks by visiting the Status page, which performs automatic tests.

item.title: Level titles & selector improvements
item.description: The Pedro PSI's game bar now supports assigning level titles from within the hints file. These titles will be shown atop the level selector window, which received some extra polish.

item.title: Puzzle type alpha
item.description: Puzzle type's alpha version was shared privately, 21 levels in total.

item.title: Progressive Web Apps (beta)
item.description: All Pedro PSI's games are now (Progressive) Web Apps, so you can now add them to your device's homescreen and play offline!

item.title: Nicer tables
item.description: All tables in the Creative Archive are now sortable.

item.title: Towards Progressive Web Apps (PWA)
item.description: The Creative Archive has suffered diverse optimisations towards transforming several pages into independent PWAs. Games, for instance, load faster. Plus diverse small accessibility improvements, as suggested by the Lighthouse tool.

item.title: Puzzle-type (alpha)
item.description: This upcoming cryptic puzzle is gaining shape. Animated logo. Sound effects. 14 levels, and counting.

item.title: Game-bar extension and auto-rotation
item.description:
The game-bar has been extended to work with any vanilla javascript game (besides puzzlescript), so it fits the upcoming minigame "Puzzle Type".

On small screens, such as in mobile devices, the screen will rotate to landscape.

item.title: Puzzlescript game database & tools
item.description:
The world's largest public puzzlescript game database was released for the first time.

Some game making tools were listed, for future reference.

item.title: Game bar keyboard shortcuts system
item.description:
A better keyboard shortcut system was added. Menu navigation using (ctrl / ⌘) (enter), (space), (⇧ (shift))↹ (tab) and arrows has improved.

GIF hints can now be played/paused with (enter) or (space).

item.title: Skilleblokker launches
item.description: Skilleblokker spillet utgitt!

item.title: Bookmarklet
item.description: The game bar now can be applied to any online puzzlescript game by means of a Pedro PSI's Game bar Bookmarklet, a suggestion by minotalen.

item.title: Hints system
item.description: The game bar now includes support for Hints, a suggestion by minotalen. Hints were added to Platformer Template.

item.title: Keyboard Keys styling
item.description: Keyboard keys across the Creative Archive are now nicely S T Y L E D.

item.title: Undo: press and hold
item.description: The game bar's undo button now supports press and hold to undo several moves at once, useful in touch devices.

item.title: Custom linear level progressions
item.description: The game bar's level selector now supports linear level progression and boss levels.

item.title: Colour matching
item.description: The game bar's colour now adapts automatically to the color scheme of the current game.

item.title: Fullscreen
item.description: The game bar's now has a fullscreen mode. Activate it by pressing the button or F.

item.title: Logo hovering
item.description: After a mathematical simplification, the Creative Archive's logo, converted to a svg vector, reveals a different pattern on hover.

item.title: Burokku Konekuta launches
item.description: Burokku Konekuta がリリースされました!

item.title: Plaformer Template minor update
item.description:
• level 31: displaced a dash to remove one unintended solution; reduced level size by rearranging elements; simplified lesson;
  • level 32: switched places with former level 31.

item.title: Data-driven changes to Plaformer Template
item.description:
Major data-driven changes to selected levels, based on average time required to win a level, plus several minor tweaks:

  • level 10: displacement of a single block to try to guide players towards the elusive solution;
  • level 26: major redesign to make it easier;
  • level 43: major redesign and simplification while retaining the core ideas;
  • level 44: reduction of level size;
  • level 46: reduction of level size and decluttering;
  • level 48: major redesign to declutter and ramp up the challenge;
  • level 50: remotion of one single dash causing one unintended solution.
